name: kaiwu
description: Kaiwu (开悟) - WPS Office AI writing add-in
author: xuemzhan

scripts.debug: npm run assets && npm run env && wpsjs debug
scripts.debug:server: npm run assets && npm run env && wpsjs debug --server
scripts.build: npm run assets && npm run env && npm run sync && node scripts/package.js 7z
scripts.build:exe: npm run assets && npm run env && npm run sync && node scripts/package.js exe
scripts.build:all: npm run assets && npm run env && npm run sync && node scripts/package.js both
